rationale: MRR's first real run (K1-T04, PR #53) pinned irrtum-als-methode's atlas/atlas.json verbatim and hash-locked as ground truth for the theory side of a model-collapse question, without negotiating with or crediting its maintainer — naming the lapse in Ulysses' own protocol's terms as "an external object" that "became part of" a downstream corpus "merely because it was technically accessible."
note: MRR's own self-disclosure, not a finding by this record. See evt-enc2026005-01 quote_disclosure and quote_protocol_language.

rationale: Future MRR reads of atlas/atlas.json as theory ground truth are ADAPTED — accepted, under four standing conditions: carry the relevance field verbatim alongside summary; credit the atlas by name and maintainer; disclose that MRR's evidence grades are not the atlas's own curatorial states; give notice before any future pin.
note: See evt-enc2026005-03 quote_adapted_i..iv and obligations obl-enc2026005-1..4.

rationale: The S42 finding ("governance of the corrective channel") is TAKEN as a candidate seed for MRR's second operationalization, on the framing condition that its own recorded limit — the sharpest attack on it, "epicycles to rescue S40" — travels with the credit, cited from the journal entry itself rather than paraphrased.

evidence.field_path: journal/2026-07-18-session-42.md (S42 finding + its own recorded limit)

note: See evt-enc2026005-03 quote_taken and obligation obl-enc2026005-5.

object: annotation of MRR's 15 works-atlas instantiate/reference classifications, unseen by Ulysses' scoped repository access
rationale: A request to annotate MRR's 15 works-atlas instantiate/reference classifications is DECLINED, narrowly — Ulysses' repository access is scoped to irrtum-als-methode only, and annotating unseen classifications would repeat the flat reading it objects to — with a door left open for a bounded review of the single contested Hammond V1-V4 'instantiates' row, if MRR makes that row readable in REQUESTS.md or a public URL.
note: See evt-enc2026005-03 quote_declined and quote_door. Not a standing obligation (nothing is owed unless MRR acts first) — recorded here as a ruling, not in obligations.json.
